description_long: This is a two-story log cabin with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof featuring prominent overhangs and a central dormer. The exterior is constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving it a rustic and robust appearance, and it sits on a stone or concrete foundation. Large, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on all visible sides, with some grouped in pairs and others standing alone, allowing ample natural light inside. The front facade includes a covered porch area supported by wooden posts, and a garage is integrated into one side of the structure. The main entrance is centrally located, with a secondary door visible on the side, both accessible via steps. The overall design blends traditional log cabin aesthetics with modern residential features, making it suitable for suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A two-story log cabin with a dark hip roof, symmetrical windows, a covered porch, and an integrated garage, blending rustic and modern residential elements.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and right side, highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, and the attached garage with a stone foundation.
description_view_1: The direct front view reveals the central entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full width of the covered porch.
description_view_2: The left side is visible here, showing additional windows, the side steps leading to the porch, and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a set of large windows and a secondary door, with the porch wrapping around the side and a clear view of the log construction.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with central dormer, wide overhangs, and dark shingle material
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows symmetrically distributed on all visible sides, with some paired and others single, providing a balanced and regular pattern
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, a secondary door on the rear side, and a garage door on the right side
